definitions.name: age_group
definitions.business_description:
Classified as:
  - 'Pediatric' when age_years is less than 18
  - 'Adult' when age_years is between 18 and 64
  - 'Geriatric' otherwise
definitions.technical_expression: CASE WHEN age_years < 18 THEN 'Pediatric' WHEN age_years BETWEEN 18 AND 64 THEN 'Adult' ELSE 'Geriatric' END
